calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian Johnson, of the Chanler Group, Tel. 510.848.8880, for plaintiffs;
Nicole M. Martin, of Stice & Block LLP, Tel. 510.735.0038, for defendants Northern Brewer, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
